title: Numbers 1 to 5
text: 1 2 3 4 5 one two three four five 12345 one apple two cats three dogs four bees five stars
tips: Numbers are at the TOP of the keyboard
Use the same finger as the letter below

character_tips.anna: Numbers! Use the same finger as the letter below.
character_tips.maxim: Left number row. Same fingers as QWERT column.
character_tips.klavochka: Counting up like steps, my dear 🪜
